calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between D. Bryant Transferor, And Jlc Capital Funding, Llc, Transferee
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Juan Carlos Lozano, Esq. of the LAW OFFICE OF JUAN CARLOS LOZANO, T:619.647.9129, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER JLC CAPITAL FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between D. Bryant Transferor, And JLC Capital Funding, LLC, Transferee, as follows:

The unopposed petition for approval for transfer of structured settlement payment rights by and between D. Bryant, transferor, and JLC Capital Funding, LLC, transferee, pursuant to California Insurance Code 10134 et seq. is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
